Patch Set 2:

(1 comment)

Patch Set 2:

> (1 comment)

> that's not the same.
> Without --all, lnet won't setup a default tcp0 interface.
> Using configure without --all is useful if you are running lnetctl net add command later (see test #5).

Yes, you're correct. I had a dumb idea in my head about what lnetctl configure --all was doing.

Patch Set 2:

It's not clear to me how networks module parameter is getting set in test_4 (leading to the test failure). The tests pass for me in local testing. Maybe add 'set -x; set+x' around the load_module() to debug this more?

Patch Set 2:

(1 comment)

Patch Set 2:

> It's not clear to me how networks module parameter is getting set in test_4 (leading to the test failure). The tests pass for me in local testing. Maybe add 'set -x; set+x' around the load_module() to debug this more?

Patch Set 2:

> It's not clear to me how networks module parameter is getting set in test_4 (leading to the test failure). The tests pass for me in local testing. Maybe add 'set -x; set+x' around the load_module() to debug this more?

Based on debugging output visible in Maloo, there is "something" that is setting a default value for 'networks' to 'tcp0(eth0)'. This is probably not set in most developer environment, that's why it is working there.
I think there should be some config file in Maloo environment that set this value. Does anybody have a clue to fix that?

Patch Set 9: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 9:

For each of these tests, we see the following in the suite_log:

opening /dev/obd failed: No such file or directory
hint: the kernel modules may not be loaded
modules unloaded.

Is this expected?

Patch Set 9:

Yes, each test load 'lnet' module with various options. Each test unloads and reloads kernel modules. You can see that the output message comes from the 'unload_modules()' code in test-framework.sh

Patch Set 9:

Code-wise looks good to me.

parents.subject: LU-12422 lnet: discovery off route state update

commit.subject: LU-12236 tests: add tests for LNET network namespace
commit.message:
LU-12236 tests: add tests for LNET network namespace

This patch adds tests for LNET for this feature.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: Aurelien Degremont <degremoa@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I2320e5da1beef30be5dcca9529fa838fc9304876
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/35666
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Chris Horn <hornc@cray.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
